branches.name: Economics
branches.description: UvA Economics and Business is globally recognized, offering a diverse environment and strong ties to Amsterdam's financial sector.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: The Amsterdam Law School is a leader in international Law and European legal research.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: Research in physics and astronomy at UvA is world-class, often conducted at the Science Park Amsterdam.

branches.name: Psychology
branches.description: One of the highest-ranked psychology departments in Europe, focusing on cognitive and clinical research.

branches.name: Humanities
branches.description: UvA Humanities offers a rich cultural and linguistic study environment in the heart of Amsterdam.

branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: TU Delft is a global leader in Aerospace and Civil Engineering, known for its rigorous technical education and invention-led research.

branches.name: Architecture
branches.description: The Faculty of Architecture at TU Delft (BK) is one of the world's most prestigious centers for spatial design and urbanism.

branches.name: IT
branches.description: Computer Science at Delft focuses on cybersecurity, AI, and distributed systems within a technical engineering context.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: Applied Sciences at Delft include ground-breaking research in quantum nanoscience and biotechnology.

branches.name: Design
branches.description: Industrial Design Engineering (IDE) at Delft combines ergonomics, technology, and business to create world-class products.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: Rotterdam School of Management (RSM) is a top-tier European business school with a heavy focus on triple-bottom-line sustainability.

branches.name: Economics
branches.description: The Erasmus School of Economics is the birthplace of econometrics and a powerhouse for quantitative research.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: Erasmus MC is the largest and most authoritative university medical center in the Netherlands.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Erasmus School of Law focuses on commercial law and the legal aspects of international trade, reflecting its Rotterdam location.

branches.name: Social Sciences
branches.description: Research-led education in psychology, sociology, and public administration.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Leiden Law School is the oldest in the Netherlands and a global center for international law and human rights.

branches.name: Arts & Humanities
branches.description: Unmatched collections and research in Asian studies, linguistics, and history.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: The Leiden Observatory and Physics institute are world-renowned, with a strong focus on photonics and chemical biology.

branches.name: Social Sciences
branches.description: Focusing on political science and cultural anthropology with a global perspective.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: The Leiden University Medical Center (LUMC) is a pioneer in regenerative medicine and immunology.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: Utrecht Science faculty is a leader in geosciences, climate research, and pharmacology.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Specializing in administrative law, human rights, and the legal aspects of social justice.

branches.name: Humanities
branches.description: Ranked among the top for literature, religious studies, and media culture.

branches.name: Social Sciences
branches.description: Comprehensive programs in youth studies and behavioral education.

branches.name: Life Sciences
branches.description: Veterinary Medicine and Life Sciences at Utrecht are unique in the Netherlands and highly respected globally.
